task_description: Implement S44K (8-page onboarding redesign), S44L (funny warnings system), and S44M (permission dialogs system) for the Mio Flutter app.

verification.summary: Flutter SDK not available in sandbox. All 7 review issues addressed (API key save, typed data class, removed dead mixin, centralized sign-in message, conditional permission dialogs, consistent opacity API, removed redundant onPageChanged). Static analysis verified manually: correct imports, strict null safety, no dynamic types, no commented-out code, theme-aware patterns, constants for all values.
